languages.text: {n}Металлический скрежет, заменяющий Тразину смех, неприятно режет ваш слух.{/n} "Тогда сгинь в небытии, когда завершишь свой краткий век... и не становись кем-то, кто оставит след в истории".

traits.locale_text: {n}Металлический скрежет, заменяющий Тразину смех, неприятно режет ваш слух.{/n} "Тогда сгинь в небытии, когда завершишь свой краткий век... и не становись кем-то, кто оставит след в истории".

languages.text: {n}The metallic scraping that serves as Trazyn's laughter grates on your ears.{/n} "Then fade into oblivion when you have lived your brief span... and do not become someone who leaves their mark on history."
languages.original_text: {n}Металлический скрежет, заменяющий Тразину смех, неприятно режет ваш слух.{/n} "Тогда сгинь в небытии, когда завершишь свой краткий век... и не становись кем-то, кто оставит след в истории".

traits.locale_text: {n}The metallic scraping that serves as Trazyn's laughter grates on your ears.{/n} "Then fade into oblivion when you have lived your brief span... and do not become someone who leaves their mark on history."

{n}The metallic scraping that serves as Trazyn's laughter grates on your ears.{/n} "Then fade into oblivion when you have lived your brief span... and do not become someone who leaves their mark on history."

{n}The metallic scraping that serves as Trazyn's laughter grates on your ears.{/n} "Then fade into oblivion when you have lived your brief span... and do not become someone who leaves their mark on history."

languages.text: {n}特拉金那金属摩擦般的笑声刺得你耳朵发疼。{/n}“那过完你那短暂的一生，便湮灭于虚无吧……千万别在历史上留下什么痕迹。”
languages.original_text: {n}The metallic scraping that serves as Trazyn's laughter grates on your ears.{/n} "Then fade into oblivion when you have lived your brief span... and do not become someone who leaves their mark on history."

traits.locale_text: {n}特拉金那金属摩擦般的笑声刺得你耳朵发疼。{/n}“那过完你那短暂的一生，便湮灭于虚无吧……千万别在历史上留下什么痕迹。”

languages.text: {n}La risa de Trazyn, un sonido de raspado metálico, resuena en tus orejas.{/n} «Entonces, súmete en el olvido cuando termine tu breve existencia y no te conviertas en alguien que deja huella en la historia».
languages.original_text: {n}The metallic scraping that serves as Trazyn's laughter grates on your ears.{/n} "Then fade into oblivion when you have lived your brief span... and do not become someone who leaves their mark on history."

traits.locale_text: {n}La risa de Trazyn, un sonido de raspado metálico, resuena en tus orejas.{/n} «Entonces, súmete en el olvido cuando termine tu breve existencia y no te conviertas en alguien que deja huella en la historia».

languages.text: {n}Le raclement métallique qui sert de rire à Trazyn vous vrille les oreilles.{/n} « Alors, retournez à l'obscurité dans laquelle votre brève existence s'est déroulée jusqu'à maintenant. Et tâchez de ne jamais laisser votre marque dans l'histoire. »
languages.original_text: {n}The metallic scraping that serves as Trazyn's laughter grates on your ears.{/n} "Then fade into oblivion when you have lived your brief span... and do not become someone who leaves their mark on history."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le raclement métallique qui sert de rire à Trazyn vous vrille les oreilles.{/n} « Alors, retournez à l'obscurité dans laquelle votre brève existence s'est déroulée jusqu'à maintenant. Et tâchez de ne jamais laisser votre marque dans l'histoire. »

languages.text: {n}Trazyn'in kahkaha işlevi gören metalik kazınma sesi, kulaklarını tırmalıyor.{/n} "Öyleyse kısa ömrünü tamamladığında unutulup git... Tarihte iz bırakan biri olma."
languages.original_text: {n}The metallic scraping that serves as Trazyn's laughter grates on your ears.{/n} "Then fade into oblivion when you have lived your brief span... and do not become someone who leaves their mark on history."

traits.locale_text: {n}Trazyn'in kahkaha işlevi gören metalik kazınma sesi, kulaklarını tırmalıyor.{/n} "Öyleyse kısa ömrünü tamamladığında unutulup git... Tarihte iz bırakan biri olma."

languages.text: {n}Trazyns metallisches Lachen schmerzt in deinen Ohren.{/n} "Dann gerate nach deiner kurzen Lebensspanne in Vergessenheit ... und werde niemand, der in der Geschichte Spuren hinterlässt."
languages.original_text: {n}The metallic scraping that serves as Trazyn's laughter grates on your ears.{/n} "Then fade into oblivion when you have lived your brief span... and do not become someone who leaves their mark on history."

traits.locale_text: {n}Trazyns metallisches Lachen schmerzt in deinen Ohren.{/n} "Dann gerate nach deiner kurzen Lebensspanne in Vergessenheit ... und werde niemand, der in der Geschichte Spuren hinterlässt."

languages.text: {n}トラズンの笑い声である金属の擦り音は耳に痛い。{/n} 「ならば、短い生涯を生き終えたら、忘れ去られることよ... 歴史に名を刻むような人間にならないで。」
languages.original_text: {n}The metallic scraping that serves as Trazyn's laughter grates on your ears.{/n} "Then fade into oblivion when you have lived your brief span... and do not become someone who leaves their mark on history."

traits.locale_text: {n}トラズンの笑い声である金属の擦り音は耳に痛い。{/n} 「ならば、短い生涯を生き終えたら、忘れ去られることよ... 歴史に名を刻むような人間にならないで。」
